description: Step into style and comfort with these delightful animal print trainer socks from Britwear. Each pack contains 6 unique pairs featuring striking leopard, zebra, and other wildlife-inspired patterns in sophisticated neutral tones of white, brown, and black. The low-cut design is perfect for trainers and casual footwear, whilst the stretch cuff ensures they stay perfectly in place throughout your day. Crafted from a luxuriously soft viscose-rich blend with just the right amount of stretch, these socks keep feet feeling fresh and comfortable. The thoughtfully designed heel provides a snug fit, making them ideal for everyday wear. Available in UK sizes 4-7, these fashionable trainer socks add a playful touch to any outfit whilst delivering practical comfort. The carefully balanced material composition of 68% viscose, 20% polyester, 10% polyamide, and 2% elastane ensures durability and maintains their shape wear after wear.
